tests that accepting a co-organizer invite adds user to accepted list

US 02.01.01 Tests that EventData.addOrEditEvent() adds an event and it can be found by searchEventID().

tests that a co-organizer invite is removed after action

test: non-organizer cannot delete comments
testDeleteCommentSync() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.CommentsUserTest
test: deleting a comment removes corresponding ID
testDeletingNonExistentEventDoesNotCrash() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.01.01 Tests that trying to delete an event that doesn't exist in the list does not crash and leaves the list unchanged.
testDisplayUsesUsername() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.CommentsUserTest
test: comment displays username instead of deviceId
testEditEventUpdatesInsteadOfDuplicating() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.01.01 Tests that addOrEditEvent() updates an existing event rather than adding a duplicate when the same eventID is used.
testEnrolledEntrants() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.EntrantUnitTests
Tests enrolled entrants
TestEnrolledEntrants() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.06.03 Tests that enrolled entrants are stored correctly.
testEventCreationHasCorrectTitleAndDescription() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.01.01 Tests that an Event stores its title and description correctly.
testEventIDsAreUnique() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.01.01 Tests that two randomly generated event IDs are never equal.
testEventItemCreation() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.04.01 - As an administrator, I want to be able to browse events.
testEventItemHandlesEmptyFields() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.04.01 Tests that when an event has an empty string for title, the placeholder logic still correctly substitutes the fallback.
testEventItemHandlesMissingFields() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.04.01 Tests that when an event has no title or description (missing Firestore fields), our placeholder logic correctly substitutes readable fallback strings.

US 03.01.01 - As an administrator, I want to be able to remove events.

US 03.01.01 Tests that after simulating a deletion from a list, the event is actually removed and the list size decreases by 1.

test: fallback to userId if username is missing

testSampleSizeCannotExceedWaitingListSize() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.05.02 Tests that the sample size cannot exceed the waiting list size.
testSampleSizeEqualToWaitingList() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest.SampleTest
Tests that everyone on the waitlist is selected if waitlist is less than maxCapacity Returns everyone on the waitlist
testSampleSizeEqualToWaitingListIsValid() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest
US 02.05.02 Tests that a sample size equal to the waiting list size is valid.
testSampleSizeNotMoreThanCapacity() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest.SampleTest
Tests if the selected users is not more than capacity when waitlist has more than capacity Returns selected users equal to maxCapacity
testSampleSizeZero() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest.SampleTest
Tests when waitList is empty Returns no selected users

testUserItemHasValidDocumentIdForDeletion() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.AdminUnitTest
US 03.03.01 As an administratos, I want to be able to remove profiles Tests that a UserItem intended for deletion has a documentID since that's what's passed to the Firestore's delete call.
testUserLocationPinnedOnMapWhenEnabled() - Method in class com.example.junimoapp.OrganizerUnitTest.GeoLocationTests
